mapper.sql: select customer_id, customer_name, customer_code, status, planned_disable_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, delete_by, delete_time from sb_customer
mapper.select: where customer_id = #{customerId} and delete_time is null
where customer_code = #{customerCode} and delete_time is null limit 1
where customer_code = #{customerCode} and delete_time is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sb_customer (customer_id, customer_name, customer_code, status, planned_disable_time, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{customerCode}, #{status}, #{plannedDisableTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update sb_customer set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate() where customer_id = #{customerId}
